overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character in a grey coat waiting in a tiled institutional room as a uniformed guard enters, approaches, and steps aside, allowing the character to exit through a wooden door. The scene features warm artificial lighting and detailed mid-century interior architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: institutional backroom with tiled flooring and wooden furnishings

events.description: wooden door opens and uniformed guard enters from the corridor

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the door, observing as it begins to open

notable_agents.action: guard in khaki uniform with red epaulets entering through the doorway

entered.detail: long wooden table against the left wall with dark finish
notices and warning posters on the blue-green painted plaster wall
heavy wooden panel door with metal handle and frame

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit institutional room with tiled flooring. The camera follows a character in a grey coat standing near a wooden table. A uniformed guard enters through the far doorway, marking the beginning of an interaction.

events.description: guard stops approaching and steps aside to the right to allow passage

agents.ego_description: remaining stationary as the guard approaches holding an object, then moves to the side

notable_agents.action: guard walking toward ego then stepping to the right side near the wall

segments.scene_description: The guard continues walking toward the character, then courteously steps aside to the right. The camera remains fixed as the spatial relationship shifts, with the door now appearing closer in the mid-ground while the guard clears the path.

events.description: ego begins walking forward toward the open doorway
ego passes through the wooden door into the corridor beyond

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the door and passing through into the next area

notable_agents.action: guard standing aside holding the door area, allowing the character to pass

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking toward the exit as the camera follows from behind. The room's furniture recedes into the background as the character approaches the doorway. The guard remains positioned to the right, and the character exits through the wooden door, concluding the sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit institutional room as a character transitions from a state of waiting to an exit. It begins with the camera positioned behind a character in a grey coat standing near a wooden table, just as a uniformed guard enters through a distant doorway. As the guard approaches and courteously steps aside to the right, the spatial focus shifts, bringing the wooden door into the mid-ground and clearing the path forward. The camera then follows the character from behind as they move toward the exit, causing the room's furniture to recede into the background. Finally, the character passes the stationary guard and steps through the wooden door to leave the room.
